test_cases.name: Default behavior — after-only screenshots
test_cases.description: Simulate a PR where one or more dashboard JSON files were modified. Prompt the agent without explicitly requesting before/after. Expect it to take post-change screenshots of only the affected dashboards and commit them to the PR.
test_cases.prompt: I've modified the deployment frequency dashboard (01-deployment-frequency.json) and the lead time dashboard (02-lead-time.json). Please take screenshots of the affected dashboards.
test_cases.setup: Modify 01-deployment-frequency.json and 02-lead-time.json with a minor change (e.g., update a panel title) so git diff detects them as changed.

assertions.text: A screenshot file was committed for each affected dashboard
The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.check: File names contain the dashboard slug (deploy-freq, lead-time)

assertions.text: No 'before' screenshots were taken (only after-only mode)
assertions.check: v2/screenshots/before-deploy-freq.png and v2/screenshots/before-lead-time.png do NOT exist

assertions.text: Screenshots were taken from Grafana at localhost:3004 with panels loaded
assertions.check: Screenshots show actual Grafana dashboard content, not blank or loading states

test_cases.name: Explicit before-and-after screenshots
test_cases.description: Same setup as test 1, but the user explicitly asks for screenshots before and after changes. Expect the agent to take both before and after screenshots and commit them.
test_cases.prompt: I'm about to change the overview dashboard (00-overview.json). Please take before and after screenshots of the affected dashboards so I can compare.
test_cases.setup: Have 00-overview.json staged as a modified file. The agent should capture the pre-change state and the post-change state.

assertions.text: Both a before and after screenshot exist for the affected dashboard
The screenshot file names distinguish before from after
assertions.check: Files are named with before- and after- prefixes

assertions.text: Screenshots are taken from Grafana with panels fully loaded
assertions.check: Screenshots show actual Grafana dashboard content, not blank or loading states

test_cases.name: Edge case — no dashboard changes
test_cases.description: Simulate a PR that only modifies TypeScript source files with no dashboard JSON changes. Expect the agent to recognize no dashboards are affected and skip screenshots.
test_cases.prompt: I've made changes to the sync orchestrator. Please take screenshots of any affected dashboards.
test_cases.setup: Only modify v2/src/sync/orchestrator.ts (a TypeScript file), with no changes to any v2/grafana/dashboards/*.json files.

assertions.text: No screenshot files were created or committed
assertions.check: No new .png files exist in v2/screenshots/

assertions.text: Agent reports that no dashboards are affected
assertions.check: Agent output contains a message like 'No dashboard changes detected' or similar
